bird.name: Emperor bird-of-paradise
bird.summary: The emperor bird-of-paradise (Paradisaea guilielmi), also known as emperor of Germany's bird-of-paradise, is a species of bird-of-paradise.…

locations.name: 休恩半岛
locations.summary: 休恩半岛（Huon Peninsula）也译为胡恩半岛，位于新几内亚岛东岸，巴布亚新几内亚莫雷贝省境内，宽89公里，北临俾斯麦海勇士号海峡，东为所罗门海，南濒休恩湾，西南为馬卡姆河。半岛上的萨鲁瓦吉德岭、罗林森岭（Rawlinson Ra…

relations.subject: Emperor bird-of-paradise
relations.evidence: It is distributed in hill forests of the Huon Peninsula

relations.subject: Emperor bird-of-paradise
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, limited range and overhunting in some areas, the emperor bird-of-paradise is evaluated as Near Threatened on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
